boundaryAssertions.ownerResponsibility: Screen flow, five-state matrix, Stitch handoff, DESIGN.md synchronization, and UX acceptance criteria.
boundaryAssertions.forbiddenOwnershipTransfer: Does not decide backend contract alone or expand PRD scope without Product/Planning approval.
boundaryAssertions.externalRuntimeModificationBoundary: Does not call or modify external platform/runtime source, agent image, entrypoint, or runtime configuration.
boundaryAssertions.humanGateBoundary: Escalates production submit, payment, PII, external messaging, legal/terms, and accept-risk-after-gate-failure.
